title: DiscGolfAPI Manifest
description: JSON Schema for the DiscGolfAPI dataset manifest published at https://io.discgolfapi.com/manifest.json. The manifest carries contract and publish versions, generated timestamp, dataset counts, and content-addressable artefact metadata for the current public release.

publish_version.description: Compact UTC publish stamp identifying this release.

generated_at.description: When this release was generated, in ISO-8601.

artefact_base_url.description: Base URL where this release's artefacts are served.

courses.description: Number of public courses in this release.

regions.description: Number of regions, states, or subdivisions represented.

artefacts.description: Content-addressable artefact manifest keyed by logical artefact name.

path.description: Artefact path relative to the release base URL.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the artefact bytes.
